T^T. ar^n^t TR, * T ^ T ^FT ^ T ^ % ?^T 3 MHHId ^ f t 11 [W.t?. 11-26/2003-TT^^,^] 918(3?) 3 t o f 5 ^ 5 ^ R ^ , 2 0 0 5 ^ t * ? > 5 l T ^ T . 3 n . 24(3?) %^nHPT^ H+lRfld^t"^ «ft I MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 9th May, 2006 i ; S.O. 667(E).—In exercise of the power conferred by Sub-section (1) and (2) of Section 5A of the Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960 (59 of 1960), the Central Government hereby makes the following amdndments in the notifications OftheCJovernmentof India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 918(E), dated 12th August, 2004 as amendep! vide Notification number S.O. 24(E), dated 5th January, 2005, namely:— \ (i) In the Notification No. S.O. 918(E), dated 12th August, 2004 for serial number (3) and, the entries relating thereto, the following serial number and entries shall be substituted, namely :— ! (3) Shri YashwantRaj, Member Joint Secretary (A&PG) Under Section 5(l)(ba:) Ministry of Home Affairs, ! New Delhi (|i) in the said notification, after serial 19 and the entries relating thereto, the following jseriai numbers and entries • shall be inserted, namely :— (20) Deputy Secretary/Director, Admn. — Member Ministry of Education UnderSection5(i)((ba) (21) Director, Wildlife Institute of India, — Member Dehradun Under Section 5(I)j(bb) (22) Maj.General(Retd.)Dr.R.M.Kharb —Member 23 MunirkaVihar,NewDelhi-67 UnderSection 5(1 Xbc) (23) Dr.Md.SaleemAslam, -Member 162/4A,Thiruvalluvar UnderSection 5(1 Xd) Salai, Thiruvanmiyur, Chennai-600041. -\ -- 2 of 3 -- [»FT1I—7gpg3(ii)] Ws\ 3JT TFTO : 3WI*IKU| (24) Dr. O.P. Sareen, 188-89, Housing Board Colony, AmbalaCantt-133001 (Haryana). (25) A Representative of Shree Mandal Mahajan Panjarapole, Gujarat . (26) A Representative of Fatehpur (Rajasthan) Pinjrapole, Society, Rajasthan (27) A Representative of Society for Prevention of Cruelty to Animals, SPCA, Kakinada, Andhra Pradesh (28) A Representative of Society for Prevention of Cruelty to Animals, SPCA, Mysore, C.P.H. Complex, Dhannantri Road, Mysore, Karnataka — Member Under Section 5(l)(d) — Member Under Section 5(l)(f) — Member Under Section 5(1 )(f) — Member Under Section 5(l)(g) —Member Under Section 5(l)(g) 2. The Central Government hereby nominates Maj. General (Retd.) Dr. R.M. Kharb, Member to be the Chairman and Dr. V.N. Appaji Roa, Member to be the Vice-Chairman of the Animal Welfare Board of India as per Sub-section (3) of Section 5 of the aforesaid Act. [F. No. 11-26/2003-AWD] DESH DEEPAK VERMA, Jt. Secy. Note: The earlier notification reconstituting the Animal Welfare Board of India was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.0.918(E), dated 12-8-2004 and S.0.24(E), dated 5th January, 2005.
